rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §28.053 governs AP/IB program awards to schools, teachers, and students. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 28.053. TYPES OF AWARDS. (a) A school participating in the program may be awarded:
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
